collision_gate.method: For every pair, compare the exact integration-base..accepted-source-head changed-path sets and require an empty intersection.

residual_gates: R-020/R-021/R-025 must turn admitted host contracts into executable package and host proof.
R-043/R-046/R-048 and R-057/R-058 retain root, containment, and lifetime closure.
R-010 may reuse but may not fork the canonical kernel.
R-011/R-022/R-043 retain assignment, runtime consumption, manifest, and exhaustion proof.
R-059 retains the independent historical full-suite portability repair.
R-030 must prove behavior and no-write semantics.
R-041 and R-005 must close app-package visibility and pin the landed public-devloop commit.
R-024 and R-045 must prove duplicate, conflict, and receipt handling.
R-042 must admit a safe public merge seam or select hold-only behavior.
R-045 and R-055 retain immutable evidence and proxy-free restart/replay closure.
R-018 consumes the map and R-033 owns executable no-write probes.

integration_verification.r003_source_inventory_verifier: PASS (20 source files, 54 ranges, 49 inventory entries, 41 Rust items, 2 TOML coordinates, 11 scopes)
integration_verification.r014_public_devloop_identity_verifier: PASS (7 exports, 14 symbols, 5 reference files, 13 cases, 10 red findings, 5 no-write red probes)

authorization_rule: R-039 remains the mandatory gate before product or UI implementation until an accepted, append-only accelerated-delivery mutation explicitly supersedes the execution process without weakening technical readiness.
